title: Avoid triggering ClassCastException with casts
description: Casting objects to incompatible types can cause ClassCastException at runtime, leading to program crashes and unpredictable behavior. Always ensure that casts are safe and objects are of the expected type before casting.
recommendation: Check object types with instanceof or appropriate checks before casting to avoid runtime exceptions.

noncompliant:
Object obj = "string";
Integer i = (Integer) obj; // Throws ClassCastException

checks.message: Check object types with instanceof or appropriate checks before casting to avoid runtime exceptions.
